query: backlit silhouette obscured anonymous figure against bright window subject in shadow
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: backlit silhouette — anonymous figures, identity erased by exposure choice, sinister window-light contrejour

response.objective_caption: The dark silhouette of a person in profile stands before a large window radiating intense yellow-orange light. Horizontal venetian blinds are visible on both sides of the frame, partially catching the glow. The figure's head and shoulders are outlined against the bright pane, while the surrounding interior falls into deep shadow.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A severely underexposed silhouette of a person in profile is crushed into a featureless black void against a blazing window flooded with a sickly, sodium-vapor orange glow. The extreme exposure obliterates all detail in the figure and nearby surfaces, while the toxic color cast and oppressive contrast between blinding light and suffocating darkness generate an atmosphere of isolation and unease. Slatted blinds flank the window, reinforcing the confined, melancholic mood.
